name: Arcane Conduit
description: A small object infused by an elemental gem or similar arcane conduit used to be able to cast arcane spells.

name: Mystic Talisman
description: A small object containing a divine symbol or other spiritual relic infused with mystical power used to be able to cast mystic spells.

name: Wand
description: A slender magical implement with one specific spell embedded. Cast the embedded spell using charges instead of Focus.

name: Staff
properties: spell catalyst, staff (3-5 spells, charges), two-handed
description: A powerful magical implement containing 3-5 spells of differing ranks. Cast embedded spells using charges instead of Focus. Requires both hands.
